summary: Test suite provides only high-level act-based integration tests with two fixture scenarios; missing unit tests for individual functions (parse_junit, parse_json, summarize), no error handling tests (malformed input, missing directories, invalid JSON/XML), no edge case tests (empty results, special characters, boundary conditions), no direct verification that fixtures match expected counts, and doesn't demonstrate TDD (red-green-refactor) as required. All tests depend on externally referenced fixtures (fixtures/, fixtures-clean/) that aren't defined or shown. The test interdependency (final test counts 'BEGIN CASE' entries from prior tests) and act-only approach make debugging difficult. Would not reliably catch regressions in parsing logic, error paths, or edge cases.
